description: Style Note Had an overdose of over the top blingy ethnic footwear? That's why portia dishes out this lovely pair. Pair them with jodhpuri pants or patialas - for a classic look opt for a fabindia kurta and linen leggings. Is experimental and edgy your thing? Then wear this with harem pants, a monochrome top and terracotta jewellery! This versatile pair can also be worn with denims and a kurti. Product Details Black thong style straps with a metal link detail at the apex of the strapsSoft brown footbedTough outsole with grooves at the heel and forefoot region and an upraised heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
